/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/sinks/MachineReadableStderrSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/sinks/NiceStderrSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/sinks/QuietStderrSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/ExportFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/RecognizerType.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rhubarb.dir/src/rhubarb/semanticEntries.cpp.o -o rhubarb  librhubarb-exporters.a librhubarb-lib.a librhubarb-animation.a librhubarb-recognition.a librhubarb-core.a librhubarb-audio.a librhubarb-time.a libwebRtc.a libvorbis.a libogg.a librhubarb-logging.a libflite.a libpocketSphinx.a libsphinxbase.a librhubarb-tools.a libcppFormat.a libwhereami.a libutfcpp.a libutf8proc.a
